lines.gurmukhi: ਪੀਵਨਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਮਨੁ ਆਘਾਵੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਵਨਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: peevanaa jit man aaghaavai naam amrit ras peevanaa |1|
lines.english: The real drink is that which satisfies the mind; this drink is the sublime essence of the Ambrosial Naam. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਨਾ ਸਫਲ ਜੀਵਨ ਸੁਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਸਦ ਜੀਵਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jeevanaa safal jeevan sun har jap jap sad jeevanaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Fruitful is the life, the life of one who hears about the Lord, and chants and meditates on Him; he lives forever. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਵਨਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਭੂਖ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਸੰਤੋਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤੀਵਨਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: khaavanaa jit bhookh na laagai santokh sadaa tripateevanaa |2|
lines.english: The real food is that which will never leave you hungry again; it will leave you contented and satisfied forever. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੋਗਨਾ ਮਨ ਮਧੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਸੰਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਹਿ ਲੀਵਨਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: bhoganaa man madhe har ras santasangat meh leevanaa |4|
lines.english: The real enjoyment within the mind is to be absorbed in the sublime essence of the Lord, in the Society of the Saints. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੈਨਣਾ ਰਖੁ ਪਤਿ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰ ਫਿਰਿ ਨਾਗੇ ਨਹੀ ਥੀਵਨਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: painanaa rakh pat paramesur fir naage nahee theevanaa |3|
lines.english: The real clothes are those which protect your honor before the Transcendent Lord, and do not leave you naked ever again. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਰਸ ਮਹਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਕਬਹੂ ਅਉਖੀਵਨਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: maatiaa har ras meh raate tis bahurr na kabahoo aaukheevanaa |6|
lines.english: Imbued and intoxicated with the sublime essence of the Lord, this experience will never wear off again. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਤਾਗੇ ਬਿਨੁ ਸੂਈ ਆਨੀ ਮਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤੀ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੀਵਨਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: bin taage bin sooee aanee man har bhagatee sang seevanaa |5|
lines.english: Sew devotional worship to the Lord into the mind, without any needle or thread. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿਓ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਰਬ ਨਿਧਾਨਾ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਦੀਵਨਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: milio tis sarab nidhaanaa prabh kripaal jis deevanaa |7|
lines.english: One is blessed with all treasures, when God, in His Mercy, gives them. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਚਰਣ ਸੰਤ ਧੋਇ ਪੀਵਨਾ ॥੮॥੩॥੬॥
lines.translit: sukh naanak santan kee sevaa charan sant dhoe peevanaa |8|3|6|
lines.english: O Nanak, service to the Saints beings peace; I drink in the wash water of the feet of the Saints. ||8||3||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੮ ਅੰਜੁਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 ghar 8 anjuleea |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl, Eighth House, Anjulees ~ With Hands Cupped In Prayer:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਹੂ ਬਿਵਸਥਾ ਤੇ ਜੋ ਮੁਕਤਾ ਸੋਈ ਸੁਹੇਲਾ ਭਾਲੀਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: duhoo bivasathaa te jo mukataa soee suhelaa bhaaleeai |1|
lines.english: He alone is happy and at peace, who is liberated from both conditions. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਤਿਸੈ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਚਿੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis grihi bahut tisai grihi chintaa |
lines.english: The household which is filled with abundance - that household suffers anxiety.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਥੋਰੀ ਸੁ ਫਿਰੈ ਭ੍ਰਮੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis grihi thoree su firai bhramantaa |
lines.english: One whose household has little, wanders around searching for more.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹੀ ਮਹਿ ਜੋ ਰਹੈ ਅਲਿਪਤਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕੀ ਪੂਰਨ ਘਾਲੀਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dehee meh jo rahai alipataa tis jan kee pooran ghaaleeai |2|
lines.english: Perfect is the work of that humble servant, who remains unattached while in the body. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਬੇਦ ਪਾਠ ਸਭਿ ਸੋਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: bahu bidh bed paatth sabh sodhaa |
lines.english: and all those who study and recite the Vedas in so many ways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਰਾਜ ਮਹਿ ਨਰਕੁ ਉਦਾਸ ਕਰੋਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: grih raaj meh narak udaas karodhaa |
lines.english: Householders and kings fall into hell, along with renunciates and angry men,

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈਐ ਮੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur mukat na hoeeai meetaa |
lines.english: Without the Guru, liberation is not obtained, friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਗਤ ਸੂਤਾ ਭਰਮਿ ਵਿਗੂਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaagat sootaa bharam vigootaa |
lines.english: The mortal sleeps, even while he is awake; he is being plundered by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਤੁਟਹਿ ਹਉ ਬੰਧਨ ਏਕੋ ਏਕੁ ਨਿਹਾਲੀਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saadhasang tutteh hau bandhan eko ek nihaaleeai |3|
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the bonds of egotism are released, and one comes to behold the One and only Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਕਰੈ ਤ ਬੰਧਾ ਨਹ ਕਰੈ ਤ ਨਿੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: karam karai ta bandhaa neh karai ta nindaa |
lines.english: Doing deeds, one is placed in bondage; but if he does not act, he is slandered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਮਗਨ ਮਨੁ ਵਿਆਪਿਆ ਚਿੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: moh magan man viaapiaa chindaa |
lines.english: Intoxicated with emotional attachment, the mind is afflicted with anxiety.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਸਮ ਜਾਣੈ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਰਾਮੁ ਹਿਆਲੀਐ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur prasaad sukh dukh sam jaanai ghatt ghatt raam hiaaleeai |4|
lines.english: One who looks alike upon pleasure and pain, by Guru's Grace, sees the Lord in each and every heart. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਸਾਰੈ ਮਹਿ ਸਹਸਾ ਬਿਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: sansaarai meh sahasaa biaapai |
lines.english: Within the world, one is afflicted by skepticism;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸਹਿ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਸੋਈ ਬੂਝੈ ਓਹੁ ਬਾਲਕ ਵਾਗੀ ਪਾਲੀਐ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jiseh bujhaae soee boojhai ohu baalak vaagee paaleeai |5|
lines.english: He alone understands, whom the Lord inspires to understand. The Lord cherishes him as His child. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਥ ਕਥਾ ਅਗੋਚਰ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: akath kathaa agochar nahee jaapai |
lines.english: he does not know the imperceptible Unspoken Speech of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੋਡਿ ਬਹੈ ਤਉ ਛੂਟੈ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: chhodd bahai tau chhoottai naahee |
lines.english: He may try to abandon Maya, but he is not released.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਉ ਸੰਚੈ ਤਉ ਭਉ ਮਨ ਮਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jau sanchai tau bhau man maahee |
lines.english: If he collects things, then his mind is afraid of losing them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸ ਹੀ ਮਹਿ ਜਿਸ ਕੀ ਪਤਿ ਰਾਖੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਾਧੂ ਚਉਰੁ ਢਾਲੀਐ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: eis hee meh jis kee pat raakhai tis saadhoo chaur dtaaleeai |6|
lines.english: I wave the fly-brush over that holy person, whose honor is protected in the midst of Maya. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਭਾਗੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਜੋਨੀ ਫਿਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo bhaagai tis jonee firanaa |
lines.english: One who runs away will wander in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸੂਰਾ ਤਿਸ ਹੀ ਹੋਇ ਮਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo sooraa tis hee hoe maranaa |
lines.english: He alone is a warrior hero, who remains dead to the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਵਰਤਾਏ ਸੋਈ ਭਲ ਮਾਨੈ ਬੁਝਿ ਹੁਕਮੈ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਜਾਲੀਐ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jo varataae soee bhal maanai bujh hukamai duramat jaaleeai |7|
lines.english: Whatever happens, accept that as good. Realize the Hukam of His Command, and your evil-mindedness will be burnt away. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਲਾਵਹਿ ਤਿਤੁ ਤਿਤੁ ਲਗਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jit jit laaveh tith tit laganaa |
lines.english: Whatever He links us to, to that we are linked.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੇ ਪੂਰਨ ਸੁਖਦਾਤੇ ਤੂ ਦੇਹਿ ਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲੀਐ ॥੮॥੧॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak ke pooran sukhadaate too dehi ta naam samaaleeai |8|1|7|
lines.english: You are the Giver of peace, the Perfect Lord of Nanak; as You grant Your blessings, I dwell upon Your Name. ||8||1||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਅਪਣੇ ਜਚਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: kar kar vekhai apane jachanaa |
lines.english: He acts, and does, and watches over His Creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸਤੁ ਉਦੋਤੁ ਭਇਆ ਉਠਿ ਚਲੇ ਜਿਉ ਜਿਉ ਅਉਧ ਵਿਹਾਣੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: asat udot bheaa utth chale jiau jiau aaudh vihaaneea |1|
lines.english: Sunset has come, and they rise up and depart; their days have run their course and expired. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਰਖੈ ਹੇਠਿ ਸਭਿ ਜੰਤ ਇਕਠੇ ॥
lines.translit: birakhai hetth sabh jant ikatthe |
lines.english: Beneath the tree, all beings have gathered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਤਤੇ ਇਕਿ ਬੋਲਨਿ ਮਿਠੇ ॥
lines.translit: eik tate ik bolan mitthe |
lines.english: Some are hot-headed, and some speak very sweetly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪ ਕਰੇਦੜ ਸਰਪਰ ਮੁਠੇ ॥
lines.translit: paap karedarr sarapar mutthe |
lines.english: Those who committed sins are sure to be ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਜਰਾਈਲਿ ਫੜੇ ਫੜਿ ਕੁਠੇ ॥
lines.translit: ajaraaeel farre farr kutthe |
lines.english: Azraa-eel, the Angel of Death, seizes and tortures them.
